mapper.sql: id, task_id, log_type, log_level, log_content, log_time, processed_count, process_speed, execute_phase, created_time, updated_time, creator_id, updater_id, deleted
mapper.delete: UPDATE ea_archive_task_log SET deleted = id, updated_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND log_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{retentionDays} DAY)
